creator: markd@grizzly.com
text:
The install media query dies with signal 11 when no gateway and nameserver
is specified.

Entered:
    URL: ftp://10.0.0.1/pub/freebsd
    lp0
    Host name: kestrel
    Domain name: Grizzly.COM
    Gateway:
    Name server:
    IP Address: 10.0.0.2
    Net mask: 255.255.255.0
    Extra:

Fix: 

Didn't have time to debug.
How-To-Repeat: 
    run sysinstall without entering a gateway or name server.
